adventure.title: The Proving Hall
adventure.introduction: You stand in an ancient dwarven proving hall, its flagstones worn by centuries of trials. A cracked pillar leans precariously against the wall, a rickety plank bridge spans a dark chasm, and an archway east leads to the sparring chamber.

hall.name: The Proving Hall
hall.description: A vaulted hall of worn flagstones. A cracked pillar leans against the north wall, ready to topple. A rickety plank bridge sways over a chasm of jagged rocks. An archway east opens into the sparring chamber.

exits.direction: East through the archway to the sparring chamber

sparring.name: The Sparring Chamber
sparring.description: A low-ceilinged training chamber. A padded sparring golem waits to trade blows, and a battered straw dummy slumps in the corner, one solid hit from falling apart.

exits.direction: West back to the proving hall

cudgel.name: Training Cudgel
cudgel.description: A heavy oak cudgel used for the proving hall's trials. Deals bludgeoning damage.

cracked_pillar.name: Cracked Pillar
cracked_pillar.description: A massive stone pillar split by a deep crack. A determined shove would bring it crashing down.

interactions.description: Plant your shoulder against the cracked pillar and shove it over.

success.narrative: The pillar groans, tilts, and crashes down in a thunder of stone and dust.

failure.narrative: The pillar shifts a hair's breadth and settles back into place.

rickety_bridge.name: Rickety Bridge
rickety_bridge.description: A plank bridge swaying over a chasm of jagged rocks. Crossing it in full gear is asking for a fall.

interactions.description: Pick your way across the swaying planks.

success.narrative: You pick your way across without incident.

failure.narrative: A plank snaps under your foot and you pitch sideways toward the rocks.

success.narrative: You catch a guide rope and haul yourself back, shaken but unhurt.

failure.narrative: You slam against the cliff face before catching yourself, ribs aching.

sparring_golem.name: Sparring Golem
sparring_golem.description: A padded training construct that trades slow, deliberate blows. It is far too sturdy for a single cudgel strike to fell.

battered_dummy.name: Battered Dummy
battered_dummy.description: A straw-stuffed training dummy, already split and leaking stuffing. One solid hit will finish it.
